verifier.py checks if the exported XML file size exceeds this threshold

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real event data for the 2024 Noto Peninsula Earthquake (USGS case ID us6000m0xl). The source QuakeML data was analyzed and confirmed to have a latitude of 37.4874, longitude of 137.271, and magnitude of 7.5, which all fall within the expected validation bounds configured in the verifier. The SeisComP database configuration (`mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp`) and the expected output path (`/home/ga/Documents/noto_export.xml`) were validated against the system setup and export scripts. The task data is non-synthetic and derived directly from public USGS seismic records.
